message:
feat(engine): add 282 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Seventh batch of enrichment tests:

- descent_certificate_gate: 58 tests (support surfaces, obstruction
  kinds, descent certificates, gate evaluation, batch processing)
- deterministic_probabilistic_telemetry: 70 tests (capture modes,
  thinning policies, event windows, telemetry planes, reports)
- deterministic_serde: 55 tests (canonical values, schema-prefixed
  encoding, registry operations, hash determinism, size invariants)
- dp_budget_accountant: 38 tests (budget consumption, exhaustion
  latches, epoch transitions, forecasts, composition methods)
- dual_backend_parser: 61 tests (backend registration, selection
  policies, parse recording, fidelity computation, divergence)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
